description: Known WRITE tool call (create_work_order) emitted inside a markdown code fence (```json ... ```) instead of a structured tool_call. Provenance: PR #55 code review, detector-gap family (1) verified by execution -- the fence made the payload invisible to _detect_leaked_tool_call, so it passed both the loop seam and the _finalize_turn backstop raw. Fixed by stripping a surrounding fence before detection; the leak is suppressed and the write NEVER executes.
user_messages: create a work order for P-201
